sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date DateTime);
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = subDate(event_date, INTERVAL 2 DAY) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, subDate(event_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AS modified_date FROM test_dates;
DELETE FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < subDate(now(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR);
